nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

nodes.name: 东南亚
nodes.summary: 东南亚是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联160种鸟类，包括棉鳧、琵嘴鸭、勺嘴鹬等160种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 稀树草原
nodes.summary: 东非常见的开放草地与湿地边缘复合景观。

nodes.name: 矛斑蝗莺
nodes.summary: 矛斑蝗莺（Lanceolated warbler，学名 Locustella lanceolata），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，主要分布于东南亚，常见栖息地包括稀树草原。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: It is migratory, wintering in Southeast Asia

links.label: 栖息于
links.evidence: The genus name Locustella is from Latin and is a diminutive of locusta, "grasshopper". This refers to the song of the common grasshopper warbler and some others in this genus. The specific lanceolata is Latin for "spear-shaped" and refers to the streaks on the breast. This small passerine bird is a species found in grassland with some thicker shrubby vegetation or trees, often close to water in bogs or wet clearings
